channel.title: Wordfence — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Wordfence (wordfence).

item.title: CVE-2026-10100 · 4.4 MEDIUM — Simple Custom Login Page <= 1.0.3 - Authenticated (Admin+) Stored Cross-Site Scripting
item.description: The Simple Custom Login Page plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Stored Cross-Site Scripting via the color settings fields (Page Background, Form Background, Text Color, Link Color) in versions up to and including 1.0.3. This is due to insufficient…

item.title: CVE-2026-3722 · 6.4 MEDIUM — Auto Image Attributes From Filename With Bulk Updater (Add Alt Text, Image Title For Image SEO) <= 4.9 - Authenticated (Author+) Stored Cross-Site Scripting via Image Attribute
item.description: The Auto Image Attributes From Filename With Bulk Updater (Add Alt Text, Image Title For Image SEO) plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Stored Cross-Site Scripting via the attachment metadata in all versions up to, and including, 4.9 due to insuffi…

item.title: CVE-2026-9048 · 4.3 MEDIUM — Slider Revolution 7.0.0 - 7.0.14 - Incorrect Authorization to Authenticated (Contributor+) Sensitive Information Exposure
item.description: The Slider Revolution plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Sensitive Information Exposure in versions 7.0.0 - 7.0.14, via the 'slider.get.full' AJAX Action. This makes it possible for authenticated attackers, with Contributor-level access and above,…

item.title: CVE-2026-9050 · 4.3 MEDIUM — Slider Revolution 6.0.0-6.7.55 and 7.0.0-7.0.14 - Missing Authorization to Authenticated (Contributor+) Arbitrary Plugin Deactivation
item.description: The Slider Revolution plugin for WordPress in versions 6.0.0-6.7.55 and 7.0.0-7.0.14 is vulnerable to unauthorized modification of data. This is due to the plugin not properly verifying that a user is authorized to perform an action. This makes it po…

item.title: CVE-2026-8382 · 5.3 MEDIUM — Advanced Custom Fields (ACF®) <= 6.8.1 - Unauthenticated Arbitrary Post Modification via Front-End Form '_post_title' and '_post_content' Parameters
item.description: The Advanced Custom Fields (ACF®) plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to authorization bypass in all versions up to, and including, 6.8.1. This is due to the plugin not properly verifying that a user is authorized to perform an action. This makes it p…

item.title: CVE-2026-7459 · 7.5 HIGH — Simple History – Track, Log, and Audit WordPress Changes <= 5.26.0 - Authenticated (Subscriber+) Account Takeover via Missing Authorization on Event Reaction Endpoint
item.description: The Simple History – Track, Log, and Audit WordPress Changes plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to authenticated (Subscriber+) account takeover in all versions up to, and including, 5.26.0 via the event reaction endpoints (react_to_event() / unreact_…

item.title: CVE-2026-7465 · 8.8 HIGH — Spectra Gutenberg Blocks <= 2.19.25 - Authenticated (Contributor+) Remote Code Execution via Arbitrary PHP Function Call via Block Attributes
item.description: The Spectra Gutenberg Blocks – Website Builder for the Block Editor plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Remote Code Execution in all versions up to, and including, 2.19.25. This makes it possible for authenticated attackers, with Contributor-level…

item.title: CVE-2026-9757 · 7.5 HIGH — GEO my WP <= 4.5.5 - Unauthenticated SQL Injection via 'swlatlng' / 'nelatlng' Parameters
item.description: The GEO my WP plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to SQL Injection via the 'swlatlng' and 'nelatlng' parameters in all versions up to, and including, 4.5.5 The parameters are read from $_SERVER['QUERY_STRING'] via parse_str() (bypassing WordPress's wp…

item.title: CVE-2026-4290 · 9.1 CRITICAL — WP Travel Pro <= 10.6.0 - Missing Authorization to Unauthenticated Arbitrary User Deletion Including Administrators
item.description: The WP Travel Pro plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to arbitrary user deletion via the /wp-json/wp-travel/v1/travel-guide/{user_id} REST API endpoint in all versions up to, and including, 10.6.0. This is due to the check_permission() callback uncond…

item.title: CVE-2025-12714 · 5.3 MEDIUM — Rank Math SEO – AI SEO Tools to Dominate SEO Rankings <= 1.0.271 - Missing Authorization to Unauthenticated Homepage Settings Modification
item.description: The Rank Math SEO – AI SEO Tools to Dominate SEO Rankings plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to unauthorized access due to a missing capability check on the update_site_editor_homepage function in all versions up to, and including, 1.0.271. This make…

item.title: CVE-2026-9189 · 5.3 MEDIUM — Contact Form 7 – PayPal & Stripe Add-on <= 2.4.9 - Unauthenticated Payment Bypass via Insufficient Verification of Data Authenticity via PayPal IPN Handler ('invoice'/'mc_gross' Verification)
item.description: The Contact Form 7 – PayPal & Stripe Add-on plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Payment Bypass via Insufficient Verification of Data Authenticity in all versions up to, and including, 2.4.9. Although `cf7pp_paypal_ipn_handler()` correctly validates…

item.title: CVE-2026-10039 · 4.9 MEDIUM — Frontend Admin by DynamiApps <= 3.28.28 - Authenticated (Administrator+) SQL Injection via 'order' Parameter
item.description: The Frontend Admin by DynamiApps plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to generic SQL Injection via the 'order' parameter in all versions up to, and including, 3.28.28 due to insufficient escaping on the user supplied parameter and lack of sufficient pr…

item.title: CVE-2026-6075 · 8.1 HIGH — Media Library Assistant <= 3.35 - Cross-Site Request Forgery via Bulk Action Form
item.description: The Media Library Assistant plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Cross-Site Request Forgery in versions up to, and including, 3.35 This is due to missing nonce verification on the bulk action handlers in the settings tab handlers. This makes it poss…

item.title: CVE-2025-11262 · 7.2 HIGH — Link Whisper Free <= 0.9.0 - Unauthenticated Stored Cross-Site Scripting
item.description: The Link Whisper Free plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Stored Cross-Site Scripting via the user_id parameter in all versions up to, and including, 0.9.0 due to insufficient input sanitization and output escaping. This makes it possible for unaut…

item.title: CVE-2026-3655 · 9.8 CRITICAL — OTP Login With Phone Number, OTP Verification <= 1.8.60 - Unauthenticated Authentication Bypass via Firebase OTP Verification
item.description: The OTP Login With Phone Number, OTP Verification plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to authentication bypass in versions 1.8.50 through 1.8.60. This is due to the Firebase verification flow in the `lwp_ajax_register` AJAX handler not binding the Fir…

item.title: CVE-2026-9243 · 6.4 MEDIUM — The Plus Addons for Elementor <= 6.4.15 - Authenticated (Contributor+) Stored Cross-Site Scripting via 'carousel_direction' Parameter
item.description: The Plus Addons for Elementor plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Stored Cross-Site Scripting via the 'carousel_direction' parameter of the Carousel Anything widget in versions up to, and including, 6.4.15 This is due to insufficient output escapin…

item.title: CVE-2026-9714 · 6.4 MEDIUM — Simple Divi Shortcode <= 1.2 - Authenticated (Contributor+) Stored Cross-Site Scripting via 'id' Shortcode Attribute
item.description: The Simple Divi Shortcode plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Stored Cross-Site Scripting via the 'id' parameter of the [showmodule] shortcode in versions up to, and including, 1.2 This is due to insufficient input sanitization and output escaping…

item.title: CVE-2025-14042 · 6.4 MEDIUM — Automotive Car Dealership Business WordPress Theme <= 13.4.1 - Authenticated (Contributor+) Stored Cross-Site Scripting via Portfolio Project Details
item.description: The Automotive Car Dealership Business WordPress Theme for WordPress is vulnerable to Stored Cross-Site Scripting via the 'Project Details' custom field in Portfolio Items in all versions up to, and including, 13.4.1. This is due to insufficient inpu…

item.title: CVE-2025-11993 · 8.8 HIGH — WooCommerce Infinite Scroll and Ajax Pagination <= 1.8 - Authenticated (Subscriber+) PHP Object Injection
item.description: The WooCommerce Infinite Scroll and Ajax Pagination plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to PHP Object Injection in all versions up to, and including, 1.8 via the 'settings' parameter in the 'import_settings' function. This is due to deserialization of…

item.title: CVE-2026-8732 · 9.8 CRITICAL — WP Maps Pro <= 6.1.0 - Unauthenticated Privilege Escalation via Administrator Account Creation to wpgmp_temp_access_ajax AJAX Action
item.description: The WP Maps Pro plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Privilege Escalation via Administrator Account Creation in all versions up to, and including, 6.1.0. This is due to the wpgmp_temp_access_ajax AJAX action being registered with wp_ajax_nopriv_ and…

item.title: CVE-2026-6275 · 6.4 MEDIUM — StatCounter <= 2.1.1 - Authenticated (Author+) Stored Cross-Site Scripting via Author Nickname
item.description: The StatCounter – Free Real Time Visitor Stats plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Stored Cross-Site Scripting in versions up to, and including, 2.1.1 This is due to insufficient output escaping on the post author's nickname in the statcounter_addT…

item.title: CVE-2026-2128 · 5.3 MEDIUM — Breeze Cache <= 2.5.2 - Unauthenticated Exposure of Sensitive Information to an Unauthorized Actor via Crafted Login Cookie
item.description: The Breeze plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Exposure of Sensitive Information to an Unauthorized Actor in all versions up to, and including, 2.5.2 This is due to improper verification of the `wordpress_logged_in_` cookie in the `inc/cache/execut…

item.title: CVE-2026-8995 · 4.3 MEDIUM — Poll Maker by AYS <= 6.3.7 - Authenticated (Subscriber+) Sensitive Information Exposure in 'ays_poll_get_user_information' AJAX Action
item.description: The Poll Maker – Versus Polls, Anonymous Polls, Image Polls plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Sensitive Information Exposure in versions up to and including 6.3.7. This is due to insufficient access controls on the 'ays_poll_get_user_information'…

item.title: CVE-2026-7430 · 4.4 MEDIUM — Post Snippets <= 4.0.19 - Authenticated (Administrator+) Stored Cross-Site Scripting via Import
item.description: The Post Snippets plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Stored Cross-Site Scripting in all versions up to, and including, 4.0.19. This is due to insufficient output escaping of imported snippet content when rendering JavaScript variables in the post…

item.title: CVE-2026-8809 · 9.8 CRITICAL — Advanced Custom Fields: Extended <= 0.9.2.5 - Unauthenticated Privilege Escalation via Validation Bypass to '_acf_post_id' Parameter
item.description: The Advanced Custom Fields: Extended plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Privilege Escalation via Validation Bypass in all versions up to and including 0.9.2.5. The vulnerability exists due to the after_validate_save_post() function unconditionally…

item.title: CVE-2026-4334 · 6.4 MEDIUM — Shariff Wrapper <= 4.6.20 - Authenticated (Contributor+) Cross-Site Scripting
item.description: The Shariff Wrapper plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Stored Cross-Site Scripting via the 'headline' parameter in the [shariff] shortcode in all versions up to, and including, 4.6.20 due to insufficient input sanitization and output escaping. Thi…

item.title: CVE-2026-6226 · 8.8 HIGH — Frontend Admin by DynamiApps <= 3.29.2 - Unauthenticated Privilege Escalation via Form Configuration Injection
item.description: The Frontend Admin by DynamiApps plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to unauthenticated privilege escalation in versions up to and including 3.29.2. This is due to insecure form submission handling that accepts arbitrary form definitions from user inp…

item.title: CVE-2026-6937 · 5.3 MEDIUM — Appointment Booking Calendar <= 1.6.11.8 - Missing Authorization to Unauthenticated Arbitrary Modification via Bulk Appointments REST API Endpoint
item.description: The Appointment Booking Calendar — Simply Schedule Appointments Booking Plugin plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Missing Authorization in all versions up to, and including, 1.6.11.8 due to the plugin not properly verifying that a user is authoriz…

item.title: CVE-2026-8689 · 4.3 MEDIUM — Visualizer: Tables and Charts Manager for WordPress <= 3.11.14 - Missing Authorization to Authenticated (Subscriber+) Arbitrary Chart Creation and Modification via renderChartPages() and uploadData() Functions
item.description: The Visualizer: Tables and Charts Manager for WordPress plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Missing Authorization in all versions up to, and including, 3.11.14. This is due to a missing capability check on the renderChartPages() and uploadData() fu…

item.title: CVE-2026-9015 · 4.3 MEDIUM — Equalize Digital Accessibility Checker <= 1.42.0 - Missing Authorization to Authenticated (Subscriber+) Arbitrary Accessibility Issue Modification via edac_insert_ignore_data AJAX Action
item.description: The Equalize Digital Accessibility Checker – WCAG, ADA, EAA and Section 508 compliance plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to authorization bypass in all versions up to, and including, 1.42.0. This is due to the plugin not properly verifying that a us…

item.title: CVE-2026-7048 · 6.5 MEDIUM — Photo Gallery by 10Web <= 1.8.40 - Authenticated (Contributor+) SQL Injection via 'order_by' Shortcode Attribute
item.description: The Photo Gallery by 10Web – Mobile-Friendly Image Gallery plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to time-based blind SQL Injection via the 'order_by' parameter in all versions up to, and including, 1.8.40 due to insufficient escaping on the user supplie…

item.title: CVE-2026-7526 · 4.3 MEDIUM — PDF Embedder <= 4.9.3 - Authenticated (Contributor+) Information Exposure via Block Editor Page
item.description: The PDF Embedder plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Sensitive Information Exposure in all versions up to, and including, 4.9.3 via the enqueue_block_assets. This makes it possible for authenticated attackers, with contributor-level access and abov…

item.title: CVE-2026-7052 · 7.2 HIGH — HT Contact Form <= 2.8.2 - Unauthenticated Stored Cross-Site Scripting via File Upload Field
item.description: The HT Contact Form – Drag & Drop Form Builder for WordPress plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Stored Cross-Site Scripting via the 'file_upload' parameter in all versions up to, and including, 2.8.2 due to insufficient input sanitization and outp…

item.title: CVE-2026-7797 · 7.5 HIGH — Appointment Booking Calendar <= 1.6.11.8 - Unauthenticated SQL Injection via 'append_where_sql' Parameter
item.description: The Appointment Booking Calendar — Simply Schedule Appointments Booking Plugin plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to time-based blind SQL Injection via the 'append_where_sql' parameter in all versions up to, and including, 1.6.11.8 due to insufficien…

item.title: CVE-2026-8682 · 4.3 MEDIUM — 3D Viewer <= 2.0.1 - Missing Authorization to Authenticated (Subscriber+) Arbitrary Plugin Settings Modification via settings REST endpoint
item.description: The 3D Viewer – 3D Model Viewer – Augmented Reality – Virtual Try On plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to authorization bypass in all versions up to, and including, 2.0.1. This is due to the plugin not properly verifying that a user is authorized to…

item.title: CVE-2026-7660 · 6.1 MEDIUM — Easy Updates Manager <= 9.0.20 - Reflected Cross-Site Scripting via 'paged' Parameter
item.description: The Easy Updates Manager plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Reflected Cross-Site Scripting via the 'paged' parameter in versions up to, and including, 9.0.20 This is due to insufficient input sanitization and output escaping in the pagination() fu…

item.title: CVE-2026-6455 · 8.1 HIGH — WP Contact Form 7 DB Handler <= 3.0 - Cross-Site Request Forgery to Arbitrary File Deletion via 'contact_form' Parameter
item.description: The WP Contact Form 7 DB Handler plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Cross-Site Request Forgery leading to Arbitrary File Deletion via SQL Injection and PHP Object Injection in versions up to and including 3.0. This is due to a missing nonce verifi…

item.title: CVE-2026-7621 · 4.3 MEDIUM — SMTP2GO for WordPress <= 1.16.0 - Missing Authorization to Authenticated (Subscriber+) Log Read/Truncate
item.description: The SMTP2GO for WordPress – Email Made Easy plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to unauthorized access in all versions up to, and including, 1.16.0. This is due to the plugin not properly verifying that a user is authorized to perform an action. This…

item.title: CVE-2026-7552 · 5.3 MEDIUM — Geo Mashup <= 1.13.19 - Missing Authorization to Unauthenticated Plugin Settings Disclosure via 'geo_mashup_content' Parameter
item.description: The Geo Mashup plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to authorization bypass in all versions up to, and including, 1.13.19. This is due to the plugin not properly verifying that a user is authorized to perform an action. This makes it possible for unaut…

item.title: CVE-2026-6427 · 6.4 MEDIUM — a3 Lazy Load <= 2.7.6 - Authenticated (Contributor+) Stored Cross-Site Scripting via Video Element
item.description: The a3 Lazy Load plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Stored Cross-Site Scripting in all versions up to, and including, 2.7.6 This is due to a regex bug in the _filter_videos() method that breaks HTML attribute quoting when processing crafted <video…

item.title: CVE-2026-9227 · 8.8 HIGH — GutenBee <= 2.20.1 - Authenticated (Author+) Arbitrary File Upload via wp_check_filetype_and_ext Filter
item.description: The GutenBee – Gutenberg Blocks plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Arbitrary File Upload in all versions up to, and including, 2.20.1 via the gutenbee_file_and_ext_json function. This is due to a flawed strpos() substring check that only verifies…

item.title: CVE-2026-9618 · 4.3 MEDIUM — PeachPay <= 1.120.46 - Cross-Site Request Forgery to Stripe Unlink
item.description: The PeachPay — Payments & Express Checkout for WooCommerce (supports Stripe, PayPal, Square, Authorize.net, NMI) plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Cross-Site Request Forgery in all versions up to, and including, 1.120.46. This is due to missing o…

item.title: CVE-2026-7634 · 7.2 HIGH — SlimStat Analytics <= 5.4.11 - Unauthenticated Stored Cross-Site Scripting via User-Agent Header
item.description: The SlimStat Analytics plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Stored Cross-Site Scripting via the 'User-Agent' header in all versions up to, and including, 5.4.11 due to insufficient input sanitization and output escaping. This makes it possible for u…

item.title: CVE-2026-7533 · 4.3 MEDIUM — Easy Digital Downloads <= 3.6.7 - Cross-Site Request Forgery to Payment Account Hijacking via 'square_tokens' Parameter
item.description: The Easy Digital Downloads plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Cross-Site Request Forgery in all versions up to, and including, 3.6.7. This is due to missing nonce verification in the `handle_oauth_redirect()` function, which is registered on the `…

item.title: CVE-2026-9644 · 6.4 MEDIUM — LiveSmart Video Chat <= 1.2 - Authenticated (Contributor+) Stored Cross-Site Scripting
item.description: The LiveSmart Video Chat Live Video Chat plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Stored Cross-Site Scripting via the plugin's 'livesmart_widget' shortcode in all versions up to, and including, 1.2 due to insufficient input sanitization and output escap…

item.title: CVE-2026-9009 · 8.8 HIGH — Crawlomatic Multipage Scraper Post Generator <= 2.7.2 - Authenticated (Author+) Remote Code Execution via 'callback_raw' Shortcode Attribute
item.description: The Crawlomatic Multipage Scraper Post Generator plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Remote Code Execution in all versions up to, and including, 2.7.2 via the filter_content function. This is due to passing the attacker-supplied 'callback_raw' shor…

item.title: CVE-2026-3173 · 6.5 MEDIUM — Meta Field Block <= 1.5.1 - Insecure Direct Object Reference to Authenticated (Contributor+) Arbitrary User Meta Exposure
item.description: The Meta Field Block plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Insecure Direct Object Reference in all versions up to, and including, 1.5.1. This is due to the plugin allowing users to specify arbitrary object IDs and object types via block attributes wi…

item.title: CVE-2026-7802 · 8.8 HIGH — Frontend Admin by DynamiApps <= 3.29.2 - Missing Authorization to Authenticated (Subscriber+) Account Takeover via 'user_id' URL Query Parameter
item.description: The Frontend Admin by DynamiApps plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to authorization bypass in all versions up to, and including, 3.29.2. This is due to the plugin not properly verifying that a user is authorized to perform an action. This makes it p…

item.title: CVE-2026-9228 · 4.3 MEDIUM — Timetable and Event Schedule by MotoPress <= 2.4.16 - Insecure Direct Object Reference to Authenticated (Contributor+) Sensitive Information Exposure via action_get_event_data Function
item.description: The Timetable and Event Schedule by MotoPress plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Insecure Direct Object Reference in all versions up to, and including, 2.4.16 via the action_get_event_data due to missing validation on a user controlled key. This m…
